dict.string: Doom Coder no longer uses Apple Events for delivery, but macOS may still request this entitlement for other system integrations.
Doom Coder creates short events with a 3-second alarm on a dedicated DoomCoder iCloud calendar when your AI agent needs attention. iCloud sync makes the alarm fire on your iPhone within seconds.
Doom Coder creates short events with a 3-second alarm on a dedicated DoomCoder iCloud calendar when your AI agent needs attention. iCloud sync makes the alarm fire on your iPhone within seconds.
Copyright © 2026 Doom Coder. All rights reserved.
Doom Coder sends a notification when a tracked AI coding tool goes idle, indicating your task may be complete.
